Video.summary: Molly Carter and Kim Kesner take on Diane Wainio and Karin Kochis in this Women's Senior Pro Backdraw Semifinal.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: Filmed at the US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, this Pro Women’s Doubles matchup features the powerhouse mother-daughter team Leigh and Anna Leigh Waters, known for their aggressive tactics and flawless communication. They square off against promising challengers Alexa Schull and Ava Cavataio, who bring fearless shot-making and tight teamwork to the court. From baseline drives to net duels, this clash of generations delivers fast-paced action, strategic rallies, and plenty of highlight-worthy moments.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Video.summary: Get ready for a thrilling Pro Mixed Doubles match featuring the number one ranked team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro taking on Simone Jardim and her brother, Marcelo Jardim. This is the first time these two teams are facing off on the Championship Court. Don't miss the action!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Video.summary: This championship game highlights the strategic play, including lobs and speed-ups, as both teams battle for the gold. A key dynamic of this match is that Courter and Carter had the advantage of playing under the shaded court conditions just before, while Dawson and Williams were coming from outside. Jen Dawson is noted as being a seasoned player on this court, having a triple crown in the Senior Pro divisions.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Video.summary: Leigh Waters and Anna Leigh Waters take on Parris Todd and Yana Newell in this Women's Pro Doubles Semifinal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: Day 4 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) presents a crucial matchup between Pune United and the high-performing Bengaluru Jawans. For Pune, this is a must-win match to keep their semi-final hopes alive, while Bengaluru is on top of their game.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2

Video.summary: It's a high-stakes "Wednesday evening pickleball party" on Day 6 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as Pune United takes on the Chennai Super Champs at the CCI Brabourne Stadium. With both teams currently sitting low on the points table (fifth and sixth), this game is a crucial must-win for both, offering a chance for one team to gain much-needed inspiration and move up the standings.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1

Video.summary: The action continues on Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) with the highly anticipated second matchup: Delhi takes on Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai.This matchup features a spectacular lineup, including Delhi's players Alexa Schule, Eduardo Irizarry, and Willie Chung, against a strong Mumbai squad that includes Brandon Lane, Glauca Lane, and Kim Ngo.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the "clash for the ages" as host city Mumbai Pickle Power takes on their fierce rivals, Delhi Dilwale, in a thrilling Day 2 encounter of the World Pickleball League Season 2. The day begins on a somber note with a tribute to the late Deputy Chief Minister of Maharashtra, Shri Ajit Pawar, as players compete with black armbands in front of a quieted stadium.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1

Video.summary: Tuesday Night Pickleball heats up as the Surprise Stingers go head-to-head with the Scottsdale Scorchers at The Orchard @ Jigsaw Health. Expect fiery team chemistry, quick-paced exchanges, and a crowd-ready atmosphere in this Arizona Pickleball League showdown.
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball – Surprise Stingers vs Scottsdale Scorchers – April 18, 2023 | AZ PBL

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball – Surprise Stingers vs Scottsdale Scorchers – April 18, 2023 | AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball – Surprise Stingers vs Scottsdale Scorchers – April 18, 2023 | AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball – Surprise Stingers vs Scottsdale Scorchers – April 18, 2023 | AZ PBL

Video.summary: The Kansas City Stingers face off against the Columbus Hotshots in a mixed NPL team match.
Video.title: Stingers vs Hotshots (Team Breaker)

Stingers vs Hotshots (Team Breaker)
Stingers vs Hotshots (Team Breaker)

Video.summary: The National Pickleball League heats up as the Indianapolis Drivers take on the Austin Ignite in a coed team match packed with intensity, teamwork, and standout rallies. Representing two competitive NPL franchises, this mixed showdown brings high-level play, strategic depth, and crowd-fueled energy to the court. Whether you're cheering for the Drivers or backing the Ignite, this match is a showcase of what makes NPL team pickleball exciting to watch.
Video.title: NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite

Image.alt: NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite

Video.summary: October 28, 2023 - It's the English Nationals Open in the Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. Teams face off to compete for victory!
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3
English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3
English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3

Video.summary: Live from Bolton Arena in Greater Manchester, this Group A match at the English Nationals 2023 features Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf squaring off against Sebastien Malbois and Roberto Rospo. The teams bring a mix of controlled setups, powerful drives, and smart resets as they battle for an early advantage in the tournament.Expect sharp exchanges at the kitchen, tactical stacking, and impressive shot-making as both sides fight for momentum in this fast-paced men’s doubles opener.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo

Video.summary: This episode of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, features a redemption match between the Sarasota Manatees and the Lakeland Palms. Both teams are coming off a loss and are looking for a win in this intense doubles matchup. The Manatees jump out to an early lead, but the Palms, with strong play from players like Ava and Ashley Griffith, manage to crawl back into the game and make it a nail-biting finish. The episode features courtside commentary from Jay Carroll and Hugh Greene.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms

Video.summary: This episode features courtside commentary on a ladies doubles match between the Sarasota Manatees and the GNV Chomp, followed by a men's doubles match between the same two teams. The ladies match showcases the absolute dominance of the top-seeded GNV Chomp, with players like Heather Nobler and Kelsey Laurent proving why they're a force to be reckoned with. The Sarasota Manatees, with new player Andy Godwin, fight to improve their league standing. The episode then transitions to a close men's doubles match featuring players Tobias Moreno and BK for the Chomp and Jamir and Jared Brooks for the Manatees.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees

Video.summary: A high-level pickleball match from the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional as the Utah Tech collegiate program's top two teams battle head-to-head. Filmed live at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah, this episode features the Women's Doubles showdown between the #2 seed Utah Tech 1, featuring Lauren Mercado and Ella Boydston, against the #3 seed Utah Tech 2, anchored by NCPA commentator Dillon Champigny and rising star Mary Monson. Experience the intense collegiate format, which includes singles, doubles, and mixed doubles, a design optimized based on direct player feedback.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, concludes its first day with the historic Men's Singles Open Final under the floodlights. England's captain James Chaudry, the only active European player with a DUPR rating over 6.0, faces off against Poland's Bartosz Karbownik (referred to as Kabosnik/Kabashnik in audio).Chaudry dominates early with a mix of power and precise cross-court angles, taking the first game decisively. While Karbownik produces moments of brilliance, including a spectacular passing shot, he struggles with his footing on the clay surface. Witness Team England secure the gold medal in the inaugural singles event of the championships.
Video.title: Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik

Image.alt: Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik

Video.summary: Heisman Trophy winner Danny Wuerffel teams up with pickleball pro Kyle Yates to take on filmmaker Doug Ellin and pro Wes Burrows in this exciting Picklebowl 2022 semifinal. Set on the scenic courts of Sea Island, Georgia, this match blends high-level pickleball with star power and charitable competition. Expect fierce play, fun commentary, and standout moments from both sides.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows

Video.summary: With Ray Colaiacovo sitting in for Tim Ring, Dave Benz talks about the growing craze of pickleball and how Pickleball first arrived to the masses on national TV via the US Open Pickleball Championship.
Video.title: The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV

Image.alt: The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
